hero.title: Travel tracking
hero.subtitle: A successful trip is above all, a better preparation!

paragraphs: Nothing more comfortable than a travel follow-up as you prepare to travel abroad. It is so nice to be able to withdraw your visa, without travelling distances to group the documents necessary for the visa application. Trust Compañeros with your file.
For example, for study trips, it is a question of ensuring for our travellers, all the steps that precede the visa application. Among other things:
studySteps: The proposal of the best universities in the destination country in terms of price quality
Simple Translation or Asserted Translation of Documents
Preparation for interview with consular service, etc...
closingParagraphs: Each travel reason includes a series of documents and professional work that helps the traveller to have a clear visa application file. You have a study trip project, don't wait for the last minute! Trust your file now at the Compañeros Center, for a successful trip.
In Compañeros, we offer language courses if necessary. Not only to succeed in your travel interview, but also to have the language level necessary to ensure your development once you arrive abroad.
Register for free now, take the necessary information and pay your follow-up fees only when you start your travel procedure.
companerosOrientation.destinationsIntro: We work for travel tracking to more than 60 countries. Our currently open destinations are:

hero.title: Preparation
hero.subtitle: Pass your entrance exams with a proven methodology.

companerosConcours.introText: We offer continuous preparation for competitions (ENS, GENDARMERIE, POLICE, CUSTOMS, IDE) The training covers the whole year. However, candidates may choose to work over a specified period of time according to their preferences.

ensSection.title: E.N.S
paragraphs: There are four Higher Normal Schools (ENS) in Cameroon: the ENS of Yaoundé, the ENS of Maroua, the ENS of Bamenda, and the ENS of Bertoua.

ENS is a higher institution for educational studies. It comprises 14 departments of education. It confers national diplomas (DIPES 1, DIPES 2, DIP. CO and DIPEN). In addition to the various administrative services, it houses a city, a restaurant and sports facilities. For optimal research, the campus is irrigated by free wifi access to students and teachers. Through its selective recruitment, it is one of the best training schools in Cameroon. This is reflected in the employment of ENS graduates in all sectors related to the country's development. Foreign students have the opportunity to pursue some or all of their university studies at ENS. It also hosts many foreign professors-researchers in colloquiums and other university meetings organized there.

hero.title: National & International Languages
hero.subtitle: Master a new language for your studies or culture.

nationalLanguages.title: LANGUAGES
paragraphs: Taking into account the great cultural diversity in Cameroon, linguistic pluralism and living together, several homes are generally found in a situation where both parents are ethnically different in Cameroon and have only French or English as the language of communication with the family. This makes it difficult, if not impossible, to pass on linguistic cultural heritage to children.
That's why Compañeros offers national language courses allowing children to speak fluently any language among more than 250 spoken in Cameroon.

NB: Our national language courses are both oral and written. However, our educational objectives place much more emphasis on oral language. Because it is essential to take the student to fluently speak his or her mother tongue within 3 or 6 months at most.
We have over 500 qualified teachers across the country and our courses are delivered in three forms:

formats.title: COURSES OF NATIONAL LANGUAGES IN DOMICILE
formats.description: Irrespective of your city of residence, our teachers will travel to work with you at home, during the times that are right for you.

formats.title: COURSES OF NATIONAL LANGUAGES IN PRESENTEL
formats.description: The learner will have to get closer to our center to receive classes.

formats.title: COURSES OF NATIONAL LANGUAGES ONLINE
formats.description: With us, you can also apply for national language courses online, according to your preference.

internationalLanguages.title: INTERNATIONAL LANGUAGES
internationalLanguages.description: We offer face-to-face language courses in our centre and online courses. Our languages are preferably the most spoken and important in international business. These are the following languages:

translationSection.title: INTERPRETATION STRENGTHENING COURSES
translationSection.description: For translation students, we offer reinforcement courses based on practical translation work and practical simulations of interpretations with scenes of the situations of the professional life of a translator-interpreter.

holidayCampSection.title: VACANCE CAMPS
holidayCampSection.description: In our centre, we also organize holiday camps to allow children to have fun by speaking their mother tongues among themselves. It is both a period of linguistic immersion and learning of a musical tool (Piano, guitar, flute...).

hero.title: Translation & Interpretation
hero.subtitle: The sworn translation is a legal translation recognized in all countries of the world by governments and foreign ministries. Contact Compañeros for sworn translation services.

companerosTraduction.introText: Simple translation is done within the delivery time of 3 working days for documents of less than 5 pages. For sworn translation, the delivery time is 7 working days for documents of less than 5 pages. NB: Delivery time for documents over 5 pages is arranged. It is also possible for the customer to request an express translation which is also done after arrangement, according to the desired delivery time.

cta.whatsappMessage: Hello, I wish to make an appointment for a translation and interpretation service.

hero.title: Support course
hero.subtitle: Strengthen the achievements of students with targeted coaching.

examSection.title: CLASSES OF REVIEW
examSection.intro: Compañeros offers capacity-building courses for students in exam classes. The subjects we propose are those of compulsory tests with high coefficients. These are also the tests where students have to work hard to avoid the score of 0/20 (zero out of twenty). The courses for students offered by our centre are as follows:

subjects.title: MATHS
subjects.description: Mathematics is fundamental to students in exam classes because they develop essential skills, such as problem solving, critical thinking and contribute to a better understanding of other subjects, cognitively.

subjects.title: PHYSIQUE-CHIMIE
subjects.description: The study of physics-chemistry in examination classes is crucial because it provides a solid basis for understanding the fundamental laws of nature and the phenomena surrounding us.

subjects.title: ANGLAIS
subjects.description: Learning English is crucial for students in exam classes, as it opens doors to many academic and professional opportunities.

subjects.title: FRANCAIS
subjects.description: Students in exam classes study French for several essential reasons. In addition to being a primary language of communication for the student, it helps to understand all other subjects from a semantic perspective.

subjects.title: ALLEMAND
subjects.description: German is often called the black beast for most students in exam classes. Hence the need to give him a lot of importance in order to avoid the playoff mark on the official exam.

subjects.title: ESPAGNOL
subjects.description: Although it is the basic subject for several students, Spanish is a subject that those in exam classes must take very seriously. Because it often happens to several of them, to find themselves with unserious notes, because of some misunderstandings due to linguistic interferences and other phenomena such as false friends, misinterpretations of the work requested etc.

subjects.title: SVT
subjects.description: Students in examination classes need to be strengthened in SVT (Life and Earth Sciences) to acquire basic knowledge about the world. It is also a high coefficient subject for scientific series. It is one of the main causes of failure at official examinations.

pricingLines: 10,000 F.Cfa per month for each subject.
Minimum number of materials to choose : 01
Number of sessions per week: 02 (09 sessions per month) for each subject.

studentsSection.title: SPANISH & ENGLISH STUDENTS
studentsSection.description: The secret for not having to catch up during the academic year is to follow the various support courses, still called Cafés. These courses are intended to support the student academically, and allow him to better understand the master courses recorded at the amphitheatre. The student has the opportunity to choose with us, only the Teaching Unit that poses problems of understanding. He is not obliged to attend the support courses at home for all the Units offered during the 2 semesters.
pricingLines: 3.000 F.Cfa per month for each EU
Minimum number of EU to choose: 01
Number of sessions per week: 02 (09 sessions per month) for each EU.

companerosFlamenco.introText: Learn Flamenco in Cameroon with Compañeros Escuela de Flamenco de Andalucía, which is the representation of LA EFA in Central Africa. You can visit the official website of LA EFA from which you can also complete your registration and attend Flamenco dance classes in Compañeros:
companerosFlamenco.extraCoursesText: We also offer lessons in guitar, piano, flute etc.

members.name: BANDERAS KOUAM
members.bio: Banderas Kouam, Founder of JBK, is President and CEO, bringing visionary leadership to the company and overseeing strategic operations to ensure success and growth in the short, medium and long term. Its specific objective is always to bring JBK as close as possible to perfection.

members.name: FADDEL EMVOUTOU
members.bio: FADDEL EMVOUTOU is Executive Director, playing a key role in overseeing the company's administrative operations in collaboration with the CEO. His expertise and dedication reinforce JBK's commitment to excellence and professional efficiency.

members.name: FRANK VERDUGO
members.bio: Frank Verdigo holds the position of Administrative Manager, where he ensures the proper functioning and efficiency of administrative tasks, he also participates in the management of organizational processes.

members.name: N-KY
members.bio: N-KY is Executive Assistant and actively contributes to the coordination of administrative and organizational activities, supporting the effectiveness of our team.

members.name: MD
members.bio: M.D holds the position of Executive Assistant at JBK, where she applies her skills to effectively support the day-to-day operations of the leadership team.

members.name: GLORIANA BINTU
members.bio: GLORIANA BINTU holds the position of Executive Assistant, where she plays a key role in effectively supporting the company's administrative and strategic operations. His dedication ensures optimal coordination within the team.

members.name: SETCHUIS
members.bio: SETCHUIS is Executive Assistant, providing invaluable expertise and critical administrative support to the JBK team's smooth functioning.

members.name: BANDERAS KOUAM
members.bio: Banderas Kouam is an accomplished Director, Producer and Actor, bringing exceptional expertise and passion to each film project in which he participates. Size: 1.78 m Weight: 79 Kg Tein: Black.

members.name: FADDEL EMVOUTOU
members.role: Assistant Director / Photo Director / Choreographer / Actor
members.bio: Faddel Emvoutu is a central member of our team as Director Assistant, Director of Photography, Choreographer and Actor. He brings his artistic and technical expertise to enrich our productions, guaranteeing exceptional quality and a coherent creative vision.

members.name: FRANK VERDUGO
members.bio: FRANK VERDUGO is a competent Production Assistant, Innovative Photo Director and Passionate Actor. His contribution is essential to the success of our productions, where he combines management expertise with a unique artistic sense.

members.name: N-KY
members.bio: N-KY is a valuable member of our team, assuming the role of Chief Monteur and Actor. With his expertise in editing and his ability to give life to characters as actors, he makes a significant contribution to the success of our productions.

members.name: MD
members.bio: M.D plays a versatile role in our team, combining his professional makeup skills with his talent for artistic interpretation, perfectly embodying the qualities necessary for the position of Makeupmaker and Actress.

introParagraphs: JBK FILMS offers you a wide range of original audio-visual material, in new and second hand according to your preference.
This is an example of the second hand devices we offer. However, you can order your equipment from Spain and receive it in 20 to 30 days.

droneSection.text: In terms of drones, we offer you preferences the Mavic Pro, Mavic pro 2 and Mavic pro 3.

cameraSection.text: Speaking of cameras and cameras, we offer Canon models in the foreground.

sections.text:
With us, create your website tailored to your needs and enjoy exceptional prices that include site design, domain name, one (1) year hosting and several other benefits! We offer you an infinite number of models to blow up your business. Among the most popular sites in our country are:

VITRINE SITES: This type of site will allow you to present your business, your services, your products etc. It is also recommended for a high visibility of your business on small, medium or large scale such as restaurants, hairdressing salon...

It works as an online business card and can take different forms, such as a portfolio for an artist.

E-COMMERCE SITES: Your online sales site

With this site model, you can sell your products directly online.

E-LEARNING SITES: for distance learning

Work remotely with your learners and receive payments directly from your services, regardless of their country of residence.

PORTFOLIOS: This presentation tool template will allow you to compile and showcase your skills, achievements and experiences as an artist, public person, scientist, health professional, entrepreneur...

hero.description: Compañeros-JBK Empire brings together educational accompaniment and travel with audiovisual production, creative services and events.

poles.companerosDescription: Pôle dedicated to training, languages, competitions and international mobility projects.
poles.jbkDescription: A centre dedicated to audiovisual creation, digital communication and creative services.

presentationParagraphs: Our company is a merger of Compañeros (the main activities of which are travel assistance abroad, language courses and preparation for competitions) and JBK (which mainly offers audiovisual productions and E-commerce).
These two complementary entities aim to meet your needs through its immense staff that will always meet your expectations.

The Empire Compañeros-Jbk whose P.D.G. is the Pedagogue, Director, Producer and Actor Banderas Kouam, offers a full range of services, including the major points mentioned in the Site Map. These points are detailed in the respective compartments: Compañeros & Services and JBK & Services which appear on the main menu of this website.

Compañeros-Jbk Empire is characterized by a commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction, our team strives to transform each service into an extraordinary experience, combining comfort and exploration.

history.description: Weared by Banderas Kouam, teacher and director, the ensemble was born from a vision linking human formation and artistic creation.

ceo.description: Director, producer and passionate teacher. Banderas Kouam breathes creative energy and educational rigor to every pole of the group, with the mission of excellence and social impact in Cameroon.
ceo.visionWhatsappMessage: Hello, I wish to exchange with the Banderas Kouam team.
